category_sources: source_facts.description says C Bounded Model Checker; official CPROVER CBMC page describes CBMC as a bounded model checker for C and C++ programs.
display_name_sources: Official CPROVER page heading uses CBMC; source_facts.name is cbmc.
docs_sources: Official CPROVER CBMC page links the CPROVER Manual as user documentation; Diffblue GitHub Pages documentation describes CPROVER tutorials, API docs, and architecture overviews.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/diffblue/cbmc, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess existing repository values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify the CBMC tool suite; official CPROVER page says CBMC verifies memory safety, undefined behavior, and assertions for C/C++ programs.
